########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/CommunityConfiguration \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/CommunityConfigurationExample
########################################

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/EventStreamConfig \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true

########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/FileImporter \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/AntiSpoof mediawiki/extensions/CentralAuth mediawiki/extensions/WikiEditor

docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/PageViewInfo \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/SiteMatrix \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/WikibaseMediaInfo \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/UniversalLanguageSelector mediawiki/extensions/WikibaseCirrusSearch mediawiki/extensions/CirrusSearch mediawiki/extensions/cldr mediawiki/extensions/Elastica mediawiki/extensions/Wikibase
